# eon_idp_group (Resource)

Creates and manages an IDP (Identity Provider) group mapping. An IDP group maps a group from your Identity Provider (e.g. Okta, SAML) to one or more Eon roles.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `idp_id` (String) The ID of the Identity Provider this group belongs to.
- `provider_group_id` (String) The group identifier from the Identity Provider (e.g. Okta group ID, SAML group name).
- `role_ids` (List of String) List of Eon role IDs assigned to this IDP group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) System-generated unique identifier for the IDP group.
